description: Monarch Money is a personal finance and budgeting service that aggregates accounts, transactions, budgets, cash flow, and goals in a web and mobile app. It helps users track spending, plan finances, and collaborate with partners or financial professionals.
summary: monarch.com exposes a public unauthenticated status HTTP API at status.monarch.com/v3 and documents an official Monarch MCP Connector, but its connect URL and authentication details are not currently published because the MCP is temporarily unavailable.
